name: Property Insurance Claims Intake
description: Property insurance claims intake for claims adjusters and policyholders initiating a property insurance claim for real or personal property damage. Evaluates the loss event, covered peril, damage scope, documentation requirements, mitigation status, additional living expenses, and coverage in force to produce a property claims intake profile with coverage indicators and next steps. Not legal advice.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.
